title: Cats
content:
There was a young lady whose dream
     Was to feed a black cat on whipt cream,
        But the cat with a bound
        Spilt the milk on the ground,
     So she fed a whipt cat on black cream.
meaning:
Unknown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Cats"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
